message:
feat(hybrid): implement hybrid properties (bd-3f0o)

Add Hybrid<T> wrapper type and #[sqlmodel(hybrid, sql = "...")] attribute
for properties that compute in Rust and translate to SQL expressions.

- Hybrid<T> in sqlmodel-core: Deref, Serialize/Deserialize, Into<Value>
- Macro parses hybrid + sql attributes, implicitly marks as computed
- Generates {field}_expr() associated fn returning Expr::raw(sql)
- FieldInfo gains hybrid_sql metadata field
- Validation: hybrid requires sql, sql requires hybrid
- Also fixes to_snake_case for acronyms (HTTPStatus -> http_status)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
